Released Sep 2023. 2 x 12050 FANs. PSU3400-01 Plus (220-277V). Also listed as 150T variant on official shop at 21.5J/TH.
Official canaan.io: A1466–150T, 21.5J/TH @Tj75°C, 3230W. Released Sep 2023. 2 x 12050 FANs. Hashrate Index real-world tested at 150TH/s / 23.7 J/TH actual.
First Canaan ASIC with sub-20 J/TH efficiency. Immersion liquid cooling (SINOPEC I-40°C Transformer Oil, flow ≥12L/min@50°C). Also marketed at 153T in some listings. Released Sep 2023.
Official shop: 150T | 3500W | 21.5J/T. Air-cooling. Shipping from Dec 2025. Clearance/legacy product on official shop.
Launched Apr 2024 at Bitcoin Asia conference in Hong Kong. 2 x Martech DF1205012B2FN fans (12V, 8A). PSU3500-01 (220-277V AC). Hashrate Index tested at 187TH/s avg at 3420-3460W.
Official canaan.io shop: 176T | 3562W | 19.9J/T. Released Dec 2024. 2 x 12050 Fans. Entry-level A15 series model.
Official canaan.io shop: 200T | 3760W | 18.8J/T. Hashrate range announced as 188-203T. Shipped Sep 2025.
Official shop page with full params. Released Jan 2025. 2 x 12050 FANs. Announced range 200-212T.
Official shop lists as (CN Stock) and (US Stock) variants. 209T | 3720W | 17.8J/T. Clearance SPOT product.
Flagship A15 series. Announced Nov 2024 at 215T+. Official shop shows 218T and 221T SKUs. Hashrate range: ≥215T.
Official canaan.io shop product page with full specs. Current HOT SPOT listing. 2 x 12050 FANs.
Flagship next-gen A15Pro+ model. Official shop futures listing at $2280. Custom 5nm ASIC chip. 2 x 12050 fans. Air-cooled.

3rd-generation immersion cooling miner. Launched Jun 2024 at Mining Disrupt Miami. Liquid flow ≥330L/min@50°C. Liquid medium: SINOPEC 1-40°C Transformer Oil. AC input ≤35A. Also available as 273T hydro variant.
Official shop listing: 273T | 4959W | 17.8J/T. Also a 270T variant at same specs. Immersion cooling.
2U rack-mounted hydro-cooled unit. Released Jun-Aug 2025. Hydro cooling (OD 14). Gross dimensions: 680 x 560 x 200mm, gross weight 22kg. Also a 500T variant at 8064W listed on official shop.
Official shop listing: 500T | 8064W | 16.8J/T. Highest hashrate variant in A1566HA 2U hydro lineup. 2025.
Official shop listing: 460T | 8200W | 17.8J/T. Previous-generation hydro unit before 480/500T.
Official shop listing: 425T | 7800W | 19.5J/T. Hydro cooling variant.
Launched Oct 28, 2025 at Blockchain Life 2025. PSU3900-01 (220-277V, 23.1A max). 14cm high-static-pressure fans, 7900 RPM, 48V. 25% more airflow vs A15 (500 CFM). Shipping from Mar 2026.
Canaan's most efficient air-cooled ASIC to date. Launched Oct 28, 2025. Flagship of A16 series. Per investor PR release: 300TH/s at 12.8J/TH. Shipping from Q2 2026. Same PSU and chassis as A16-282T.

max_hashrate_note: Multi-power mode: 65W, 100W, 140W. At 65W: lower hashrate. At 140W: ~4TH/s.
notes: Official shop spec: 4T/29J. Air outlet temp: 40-60°C. Noise: 33-36dB. Available in 5 colors. Desktop/home miner. Price from $99-$129.
50% hashrate upgrade over Nano 3, same 140W power draw. Noise: 35-40dB. Low mode: ~33dB. Official shop price $299. Successor to Nano 3.
Baseboard space heater form factor. Released March 2025. Integrated PSU, app-controlled (Avalon Family App iOS/Android). Tip-over auto shutoff safety feature. Official shop price $999.

max_hashrate_note: Power range: 800W to 1674W depending on mode.
notes: Home/residential miner. Official shop: 90T | 1674W | 18.6J/T. Air-cooling. Very wide operating temperature range (-45°C). Quietest industrial-class miner at 45dB. Official shop price $1888.
